# WardBulletin

> Free digital ward bulletin creator for LDS wards and branches.

## What is WardBulletin?

WardBulletin (https://wardbulletin.com) is a free, modern web application for creating, sharing, and printing ward bulletins (sacrament meeting programs) for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

## Key Features

- Create beautiful sacrament meeting programs with hymns, speakers, prayers, and announcements
- Quick-start templates for Sacrament Meeting, Fast & Testimony Meeting, Baptism, Ward Conference, Special Programs, and 5th Sunday — create a bulletin in under 2 minutes
- Share bulletins instantly via custom links and auto-generated QR codes
- Print-optimized PDF bulletins designed for folding and Sunday distribution
- Mobile-friendly design — works on phones, tablets, and desktops
- Multi-language support: English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Chinese (9 languages)
- Built-in hymn database with links to official Church music in all 9 languages
- Built-in Children's Songbook database in all 9 languages
- Collaborative announcement submissions — ward members can submit announcements for review
- Ward/branch sharing — invite editors and viewers to collaborate on bulletins
- Bulletin scheduling — schedule bulletins to auto-activate on specific dates
- Recurring announcements — save and reuse weekly announcements
- Weekly scheduler — plan bulletins for upcoming weeks
- Supports both ward and branch terminology
- 9 typography themes for visual customization
- 26 curated LDS header images plus custom image upload
- Free to use with no ads, no trackers, and no data sales

## Who is it for?

- Ward bulletin specialists
- Branch bulletin creators
- Bishopric members who manage sacrament meeting programs
- Ward clerks
- Anyone responsible for creating weekly church bulletins in LDS wards or branches

## How it works

1. Visit wardbulletin.com and start building a bulletin immediately (no sign-in required)
2. Choose a quick-start template (Sacrament Meeting, Fast Sunday, Baptism, Ward Conference, Special Program, or 5th Sunday) or start from blank
3. Add ward name, date, leadership, hymns, speakers, prayers, and announcements
4. Create a free account to save, share via link/QR code, and manage multiple bulletins
5. Print as a foldable PDF or share digitally — ward members scan the QR code to view on their phones

## Quick-Start Templates

- **Sacrament Meeting** — Standard meeting with speakers and sacrament
- **Fast & Testimony Meeting** — First Sunday with open testimony bearing
- **Baptism Program** — Baptismal service with speakers and music
- **Ward Conference** — Stake leadership visiting with multiple speakers
- **Special Program** — Musical program for Christmas, Easter, etc.
- **5th Sunday** — Combined meeting with focused speakers

## Comparison with Alternatives

WardBulletin offers the most features of any free LDS ward bulletin tool:

| Feature | WardBulletin | WardBullet | WardBulletin.app |
|---------|---------------|------------|------------------|
| Languages | 9 | 5 | 1 |
| Hymn database | Full hymnal + Children's Songbook | No | No |
| Quick-start templates | 6 types | Multiple | Limited |
| Collaborative editing | Yes (roles) | No | No |
| Announcement submissions | Yes | No | No |
| Bulletin scheduling | Yes | No | No |
| Recurring announcements | Yes | No | No |
| Image customization | 26 + custom upload | Backgrounds | No |
| Typography themes | 9 | Limited | No |
| Ward + Branch | Yes | Ward only | Ward only |
| Price | Free | Free | Free |

## Technical Details

- Web application (no download or app install required)
- Built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS
- Optimized bundle with code splitting and lazy loading for fast page loads
- Hosted on Vercel
- Data stored securely in Supabase
- No cookies, no analytics trackers, no third-party data sharing

## Contact

Visit https://wardbulletin.com/contact for support.
